project.component: { "keyToString": { "Batch.Start.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-Project Loading Error": "Could not load project", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-WindowsDefender": "Microsoft Defender may affect IDE", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-grazie.missing.language": "Proofreader is Missing Languages", "Notification.DoNotAsk-Project Loading Error": "true", "Notification.DoNotAsk-WindowsDefender": "true", "Notification.DoNotAsk-grazie.missing.language": "true", "Python.Digital Asset Management.executor": "Run", "Python.akstracja_cech.executor": "Run", "Python.app.executor": "Run", "Python.bezpieczne_nazwy.executor": "Run", "Python.czytaj_tekst.executor": "Run", "Python.czytanie_AI.executor": "Run", "Python.ekstrakcja_cech.executor": "Run", "Python.generuj_gradient.executor": "Run", "Python.generuj_mozaike.executor": "Run", "Python.napraw_zbiór.executor": "Run", "Python.pokazanie_bazy.executor": "Run", "Python.sprawdz_nowe.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "ai.playground.ignore.import.keys.banner.in.settings": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.jetbrains.python.configuration.PyActiveSdkModuleConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
